args: test -f "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/pipeline/checker-findings.json" || { echo '[orchestrator] BLOCKED: checker exited without writing findings. Re-invoke write_findings before stopping.' >&2; exit 2; }

test -f "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/pipeline/reviewer-findings.json" || { echo '[orchestrator] BLOCKED: reviewer exited without writing findings. Re-invoke write_findings before stopping.' >&2; exit 2; }

P="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/pipeline"; { printf '# Pipeline Snapshot — %s\n' "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"; for f in checker-findings.json reviewer-findings.json; do [ -f "$P/$f" ] && { printf '## %s\n' "$f"; cat "$P/$f"; echo; }; done; } > "$P/pre-compact-snapshot.md" 2>/dev/null || true

P="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/pipeline"; UNREAD=""; [ -f "$P/checker-findings.json" ] && UNREAD="${UNREAD}checker-findings.json "; [ -f "$P/reviewer-findings.json" ] && UNREAD="${UNREAD}reviewer-findings.json "; if [ -n "$UNREAD" ]; then echo "[orchestrator] Teammate idle blocked: unread findings (${UNREAD})— read .claude/pipeline/ before continuing." >&2; exit 2; fi
